messages.content: Rispondi in modo diretto, utile e senza ragionamento visibile.

Write a COMPLETE and COMPACT single-file HTML page for a coffee shop. Output ONLY the HTML, nothing else. Keep the CSS SHORT (about 10-15 rules max) - prioritize a COMPLETE, working page over elaborate styling. The page MUST be fully closed with and MUST contain all of these: 1. A
with three links: Home, Menu, Contact. 2. A hero
with

Bean & Brew

and a one-line subheading. 3. A wired in
